programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 15 Minute Meals
programme.sub-title: Malaysia: Fish Baps and Mushroom Farfalle
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes his best fish sandwiches, mushy peas and tartar sauce. Later, he cooks mushroom farfalle with blue cheese and a hazelnut and apple salad.

programme.title: Jamie's 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie cooks lamb lollipops with curry sauce, rice and peas, and prawn linguine with Sicilian shaved fennel salad.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Amazing Race Canada
programme.desc: The Race continues in St. John's and Gander, Nfld., where the remaining teams compete for a coveted spot in the Season 11 finale.

programme.title: Country House Hunters: New Zealand
programme.desc: Tatjana seeks a tranquil, seaside home in the serene Mangawhai, where the allure of beach living harmonizes with a laid-back, peaceful lifestyle.

programme.title: Country House Hunters: New Zealand
programme.desc: Evelyn and Richard are on a quest in Nelson to find a home that inspires creativity, offering a peaceful retreat within a vibrant, artistically rich community.

programme.title: Next Level Chef
programme.desc: Each chef must select two different boxes, each representing a state and its local ingredients, and then create one inventive fusion dish.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank contends with a potentially dirty cop within his ranks; Eddie and Badillo track down the culprits behind the theft of valuable, rare works from a celebrated bookstore; Erin snoops into the background of a new woman in Anthony's life.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin's nephew, police officer Joe Hill, becomes aware of witness tampering in a trial; Baez forces Danny to help her find the killer of her favorite TV personality; Eddie questions her decision to become a police sergeant.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Helping prospective buyers find their dream home in the country.

programme.title: Thirst With Shay Mitchell
programme.desc: Shay Mitchell explores the world one drink at a time as she visits exotic locations, samples unique ingredients, and meets expert hosts; on her journey, she encounters the latest drink trends, the best bars, and 8,000 years of sipping history.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: MasterChef Australia: Back to Win
programme.desc: Chef Nornie Bero surprises the contestants with a mystery box filled with native Australian ingredients.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Steve Brown faces a double challenge in his home county of Kent as he helps two sisters from London to buy a house each; with two separate budgets and different priorities, they are exploring options for rural and coastal living.

programme.title: MasterChef Canada
programme.desc: The remaining competitors take on the artful cuisine of Japan throughout three grueling rounds of challenges.

programme.desc: From fashion to beauty to décor to restaurant quality eats, Mary and her experts reveal their favourite dupes; the cast of "Degrassi: Whatever It Takes.".

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy
programme.desc: Cake is the star of the show and Mary has three foolproof cake recipes to make sure any celebration is a hit.

programme.desc: Spencer offers tips on preparing a Greek feast.

programme.desc: The remaining competitors face their first Team Challenge as they prepare takeout orders for at-home diners.

programme.desc: On the high-stakes season finale, the final teams head to Collingwood, Ont. for a double Roadblock and chance to jetsurf their way to victory!

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy
programme.desc: Mary makes the freezer a friend by throwing together four recipes with frozen ingredient staples.

programme.title: Spencer's BIG 30
programme.desc: Spencer prepares his favourite recipes for soup and sandwiches.

programme.desc: Frank contends with public outcry to defund the NYPD School Safety Division, after a physical altercation between a school officer and a student goes viral; Danny and Baez help a father track down his missing ex-wife and daughter.

programme.desc: Frank, Baker, Garrett and Gormley experience guilt when an officer they briefly worked with is shot after Frank reassigned her for not meshing with their team; Anthony is offered a promotion that strains his relationship with Erin.

programme.sub-title: Chicken Dim Sum and Crab Briks

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Helping prospective buyers find their dream home in the country.

programme.title: My Pet Ate What?
programme.desc: A canine's strange appetite delivers a stomach full of surprises; a cat with hair-ific taste leads to a marathon recovery mission; Dr. G's son, Ben, joins him for an action-packed summer.

programme.title: My Pet Ate What?
programme.desc: A Bernese Mountain Dog suspected of scarfing an unmentionable feast is a potential record-breaking challenge for Dr. G; a feline rushed to a clinic after a close encounter with a sewing kit sparks a race against the clock to save a family from loss.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia: Back to Win
programme.desc: Aussie legend Curtis Stone returns for a slow cooked lamb and ravioli cook-along, which descends into chaos as a home-made ricotta derails some contestants multiple times.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Chris Bavin meets a couple returning to the UK after 20 years living abroad in Canada.

programme.title: The Amazing Race Canada
programme.desc: The teams tackle various challenges with the hope of winning two first-ever Chevrolet Silverado ZR2's, a once-in-a-lifetime trip for two around the world, a $250,000 cash prize, and the coveted title of "The Amazing Race Canada" champions.

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy
programme.desc: Mary shows how embracing your oven and baking for breakfast is the ultimate game-changer to switch up the daily grind.

programme.title: Spencer's BIG 30
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts prepares a homemade Thai feast.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank is blindsided when Mayor Chase bypasses him with a request for Jamie to head his security detail; Danny and Baez investigate the murder of a wealthy college student; Anthony fears money woes are leading his sibling down the wrong path.
